name: PatonCycleBase
javadoc:
/** * Find a cycle base of an undirected graph using the Paton's algorithm. * *

See:
* K. Paton, An algorithm for finding a fundamental set of cycles for an * undirected linear graph, Comm. ACM 12 (1969), pp. 514-518. * * @param the vertex type. * @param the edge type. * * @author Nikolay Ognyanov */
